message:
style(indexer): rewrite .then(|| ..).unwrap_or_default() as if/else (uiojh clippy)

FILE: src/indexer/mod.rs acquire_flow_reservation

Clippy's bool_then lint flagged waited.then(|| wait_started.elapsed())
.unwrap_or_default() as unclear; the if/else form is idiomatic and one
evaluation cheaper on the non-waited branch (Duration::default is const).

uiojh scope item 7 cleanup: cargo clippy --all-targets --no-deps now
reports zero warnings on rch remote.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
